parents.subject: LU-9652 quota: Add kernel doc style for quota (1)

commit.subject: LU-8453 obdclass: fix use-after-free in class_manual_cleanup()
commit.message:
LU-8453 obdclass: fix use-after-free in class_manual_cleanup()

class_manual_cleanup() accesses obd->obd_name after calling
class_process_config() for LCFG_CLEANUP and LCFG_DETACH.
These operations may drop the last reference on the OBD device
via class_decref(), freeing the obd structure. The subsequent
CERROR calls then dereference freed memory, causing a kernel
page fault in strnlen() during debug message formatting.

Save obd_name to a local buffer before the cleanup/detach
operations and use the saved copy in all subsequent references.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sohei Koyama <skoyama@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ia2c36018033c7dc09cb5ec567e90325638254573
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63836
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
